description: Implement a non-writing Pyex workflow that plans bounded Exa queries, dedupes candidates, ranks them against the company profile, and selects enrichment targets. Inject only frozen inputs and narrow read capabilities; enforce hard BEAM process limits. Carry docs/code-mode-workflow-runtime-notes.md into this implementation as the reviewed runtime-boundary guidance, update it for any decisions proven by the pilot, and keep its status explicit until implementation exists. Acceptance: compare determinism, precision, latency, and maintainability against the existing Elixir baseline using the evaluation corpus; documentation matches the implemented capability, durability, process-isolation, and PLC artifact boundaries.
title: Pilot Pyex for acquisition query planning and ranking
